programme.desc: First to host in north Kent is clairvoyant and medium Yvette Tamara. The night gets off to a spooky start when data analyst John Tower and working mum Yemi Christopher-Soares discover a ghost busting machine.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Data analyst John Tower is second to host in north Kent. John has a passion for military re-enactment and barks orders at the table. However, not all of the guests are won over by Johns Filipino fatty pork stew and psychedelic dessert.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Project manager Yemi Christopher-Soares hopes her guests in north Kent will lap up her Nigerian-inspired menu and share her fondness for spice.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the penultimate night in north Kent and the turn of cocky Jono Simm, who is convinced his wholesome and hearty menu is a winner. Sadly two of his guests arent convinced by the cooking.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in north Kent and the turn of cheeky party-loving Lisa Townend to be the host. Her menu is full of mysterious French fancies, including coq surprise, while her innovative entertainment is human roulette.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the Isle of Wight, were at John and Sue Blakemores Golf House. Their guests and rivals for the week are Londoners Nick Tyrie and Layla Amini, John Graham from Blackpool and hostel-owners Victoria and David Sharrock.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick Tyrie and his best friend Layla Amini welcome the guests to the New Inn pub in St. Johns Wood, London. Singer songwriter Layla reveals her `Top of the Pops past and treats the guests to a performance.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Bunkroom hostel in Chester, David Sharrock is determined to prove hostelling is for everybody - even if his wife Victoria isnt convinced. Its bunkbeds and budget breakfast for all.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to John Grahams The B and B in Blackpool, where an afternoon of ten pin bowling finds the competitive levels reaching fever pitch.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet one last time to find out what theyve been paid and confront their critics face to face. Tension runs high as the payments come to light, but who will be crowned best value BandB of the week?

programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in Hertfordshire, where cheesemonger Julia wants the rural idyl, and Bollywood singer Priti and data analyst Shakti want to keep their links to London.

programme.desc: In the Southern Ocean, courageous penguins break the rules to find their edge. Bertie Gregory follows the rockhoppers, gentoos and macaronis to discover a world of risk-takers, rebels, and unconventional parents.

programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: Simon and Sioux nearly get bitten catching and releasing mating Boomslangs. Teamwork is everything, but sometimes they split up to help all the snakes.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: As winter arrives in Port Protection, the community takes advantage of some mild weather to increase their chance of survival.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: After a series of failed hunts, 70-year-old Gary Muehlberger treks deep into the Alaskan wilderness in search of a doe.

programme.title: Worlds Weirdest
programme.desc: From breeding edible insects to milking spiders, the unusual to the downright dangerous, this is a look at the stranger side of farming.

programme.title: Worlds Weirdest
programme.desc: If it creeps, crawls or buzzes, theres a chance it could cure a major illness. Explore the untapped healing properties of unappealing animals.

programme.title: Yukon Vet
programme.desc: Two bear cubs recovering from a harrowing experience need Dr Oakleys expertise as they embark on a long journey to a new home. What should be an easy surgery may just leave Rusty the Labrador Retriever breathless.

programme.title: Gerry Kyei: NextUp Special
programme.desc: Anecdotal, observational and refreshingly honest in style, Gerrys comedy is enriched by a somewhat unique perspective.

programme.title: Rodney Laney: Who Is Rodney Laney?
programme.desc: Comedian Rodney Laney is a seasoned comedy writer having completed pilots for Comedy Central and MTV; he performs in this stand-up special.

programme.title: Billy Anderson: Americas Sweetheart
programme.desc: Texas-born and Georgia-bred comic Billy Anderson riffs on life.

programme.title: Mike P. Burton: I Can Get Whiter
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions.

programme.title: Kathleen Dunbar: Ive Got a Little Surprise For Ya
programme.desc: Kathleen Dunbar has a wake up call for anyone 20 and younger, a warning for bra-dialers, and more than a few tips on how to deal with "little demon pig people."

programme.title: Dylan Mandlsohn: Cruising America
programme.desc: Dylan Mandlsohn uses his own brilliant comedy to entertain and challenge social norms by pushing boundaries that promote forward thinking.

programme.title: Scott Novotny: A Trip to Goofyville
programme.desc: Scott Novotny brings his high-energy goofyness to the live audience at DryBar.

programme.title: Dave Burleigh: Nobodys Keeping you Here

programme.title: Chris Voth: Cashmere
programme.desc: Chris Voth is an accomplished comedian, a licensed teacher and a published author.

programme.title: Cash Levy: Game of Chance
programme.desc: Comedian Cash Levy performs a standup set.

programme.title: Aaron Woodall: Sad and Needy

programme.title: Mark Poolos: One Wife, Two Daughters, Zero Influence

programme.title: Joe Larson: Champion

programme.title: Travis Nelson: To Touch A Cloud

programme.title: Tom Ryan: Off the Verge
programme.desc: Comedian Tom Ryan performs a standup show.

programme.title: Steve Soelberg: Pirate Hymns
programme.desc: Steve Soelberg returns to the stage for a night of standup full of pirate hymns and appendicitis.

programme.title: Sid Davis: Baggage Claim
programme.desc: Former airline worker Sid David brings his unique comedy to the stage for a night of standup.

programme.title: John Deming: Sadder Than Most Horses
programme.desc: Comic John Deming performs an unpredictable live show in his iconic style.

programme.title: Jesse Egan: Thats the Spirit
programme.desc: Comedian Jesse Egan performs a standup show.

programme.title: Karen Rontowski: Ridiculous Me
programme.desc: Karen Rontowski shares his fast-paced, quirky, and charmingly optimistic style of comedy.

programme.title: Kellen Erskine - Composed
programme.desc: Dry Bar Comedy presents Kellen Erskine; Kellen has been a finalist of both the San Francisco International Comedy Competition and the Great American Comedy Festival.

programme.title: Fred Klett: One of Ten
programme.desc: Fred Klett showing off his clean comedy trademark, appealing to families with members of all ages with material taken from his experiences growing up in a large Christian family.

programme.title: Bob Stromberg: Im a Pretty Big Deal
programme.desc: Comedian Bob Stromberg performs a standup set.

programme.title: Rob Little: Ado-Rob-Ble
programme.desc: Rob Littles outlook on life can be summed up in two words: Pure optimism. In a recent interview he revealed, in elementary school, kids would always pull food away from him at lunchtime saying mean, hurtful things like "Let go of my sandwich!".

programme.title: Brad Upton: Will Be Funny for Money
programme.desc: Brad Upton first stepped on stage in September of 1984 and hes never looked back. This ex-grade school teacher is now in his 30th year of comedy and is nearing 6000 lifetime performances.

programme.title: Billy Anderson: Americas Sweetheart
programme.desc: Texas-born and Georgia-bred comic Billy Anderson riffs on life.

programme.title: Tommy Tiernan: Under the Influence
programme.desc: The 1998 Perrier winner shows he is still one of the best in an autobiographical and irreverent collection of musings on all things sex, drugs and religion.

programme.title: Phil Kay: Live at the Museum of Comedy
programme.desc: Fun fuelled fast wordy riffage, instant Philosophies, ramblings and improvised singer-songwriting is on the menu as mythic Scottish psychedelic raconteur Phil Kay performs.

programme.title: Britney - Friends and Nothing More
programme.desc: Charly and Ellen have been best friends ever since a shared moment of transformational theatre in Year 8 Drama Club. Ten years on, Charly is leaving New York and a dubious career leafleting Broadway to visit Ellen back in their home village of Cumwell. Neither of them can wait to relive the glory days of their friendship: a nonstop rom-com of hair crimping, MmmBop and an unhealthy level of co-dependence.

programme.title: Conrad Kosh: White Noise
programme.desc: South Africas top ventriloquist chats racism, apartheid and colonialism, with his double International EMMY award nominated puppet friend and South African TV star Chester Missing.

programme.title: Ben Van der Velde: Fablemaker
programme.desc: Ben Van der Velde raids the library of his fantastical imagination to create thrillers, romances, ghost stories and more original freewheeling tales thatve never been told before and never will be again.

programme.title: Ben Target: Discover
programme.desc: The words genius, unique and the best are often misused. Ben Target is a comedian. He will be with you for 46 minutes. programme.desc: King Thistle wants fish for dinner, so he goes out fishing with Mr Elf, Ben and Holly on Mr Elfs boat. Mr Elf tells them a story about the biggest, baddest fish ever - Big Bad Barry.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.sub-title: Garden Gate, Long Lost Watch, Flickball Machine
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First, metal maestro Dominic Chinea faces an epic challenge when Liz Draper from Dorset delivers a crumbling, cast-iron garden gate. The gate was designed and built by her brother as a gift for Liz and her late husband, Ken. Ken was an army man and proud member of the Royal Lancers, and the gates design incorporates his regiments badge.

programme.desc: A handsome plumber (Lee Phillips) blackmails suburban housewives until his latest victim (Phyllis Thaxter) turns the tables.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Penniless and in danger of losing his beautiful girlfriend, an ace memory man tries to exploit his one asset by helping a dubious character recall a station locker number.

programme.title: Discovering Film

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man has an unpleasant shock when he learns that his recently deceased father owed large sums of money to booksellers specialising in salacious volumes, and he resolves to save his mother from further distress.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: George Devon is murdered, and one of his nephews is seen fleeing the scene. The problem is Devons nephews are identical twins. Sheriff Milt Singleton investigates.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A prosecutor (Pat Hingle) considering a run for Congress is told that he may have convicted an innocent man.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: Elbow frontman Guy Garvey walks through more era-defining musical performances, long lost studio appearances and interviews.

Midnight Movies: From the Margin to the Mainstream

Along the way, the trio are joined for a jam session with country music guitarist Vince Gill.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2023 (Highlights)
programme.desc: Highlights of the Isle of Wight Festival, which this year featured headline sets from Pulp, George Ezra, The Chemical Brothers and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Women Who Rock

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker finds a clue that might help him understand why his parents disappeared when he was young. His path puts him on a collision course with Dr. Curt Connors, his fathers former partner.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Adaptation of the adventures of the swinging comic-strip hero. A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The comic book web-slinger returns for a blockbusting sequel. Crime-fighting has cost Peter Parker his best friend and his true love Mary Jane. However, just as he quits as Spider-Man, New York comes under threat from Dr Octopus, a metal-tentacled madman. Peter has no choice but to swing back into action.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, its not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Geeky highschooler Sam Witwicky buys his first-ever car, hoping it will improve his chances with Mikaela. Imagine his surprise when his beat-down Camaro transforms into an alien robot called `Bumblebee and asks for his assistance in a deadly war.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: The cynical commander of Allied Nations forces has to prevent a warlord from taking over the world. With 63 hostages held in his seemingly impregnable fortress, the warlord is demanding an outrageously hefty ransom.

programme.title: Street Fighter

They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A domesticated terrier and his unruly canine pal encounter a rebellious bunny and his gang of abandoned pets.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Max the terrier encounters canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a scary turkey when he visits the countryside. Luckily for Max, he soon catches a break when he meets Rooster, a gruff farm dog who tries to cure the lovable pooch of his neuroses.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: Hoping to become a famous musician, a young Tibetan Mastiff leaves home to find a legendary and reclusive music artist, setting off a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A placid small town is brought to its knees by an infestation of destructive small creatures with a vicious sense of humour.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Six years after defeating the Gremlins, Billy and Kate have grown up and moved to New York. However, Billy stumbles across Gizmo in a genetics lab and when he gets wet, all hell breaks loose, and the stage is set for more deliciously bad taste humour.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A slick attorney fails to show up for his sons fifth birthday, prompting the boy to make a wish that his father would tell the truth for just one day. Miraculously, the wish is granted and for the next 24 hours, the formerly mendacious lawyer is unable to tell a single lie.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydias life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuices name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: A reluctant bare-knuckle boxer and his manager brother must travel across the country for one last fight, but an unexpected travel companion exposes the cracks in their bond along the way.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: The story of the back-channel negotiations between the development of the 1990s Oslo Peace Accords between Israel and the Palestinian Liberation Organization.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: Andy Dufresne and Ellis Boyd `Red Redding are two prisoners serving long sentences in the vicious Shawshank jail. The two come to terms with their imprisonment while surviving the sadistic acts of prison warden Samuel Norton, and for both, a different sort of redemption awaits.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Goring.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman

programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Two adopted brothers and rival dancers are thrust together when they are both invited to audition for the World Breaking Championships.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland to rediscover his true identity in order to rescue his children from the clutches of the evil Captain Hook. Peter has grown up into a workaholic executive but takes time off for a holiday in London. Once there, his children are kidnapped by Hook, and Peter must throw off his corporate image and go back to Neverland to save his children.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his fathers disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: A young farmhand gets swept into the realm of legend when he must defend his land from a seemingly unstoppable force of giant warriors.

However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owners kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A group of petty criminals plan to rig a major traffic jam to divert attention from their bank heist.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: When reporter Daniel Malloys curiosity leads him to interview the mysterious Louis De Pointe Du Lac, the last thing he expects is to find himself talking to a vampire. Louis tells him his life story, about how he was turned, and the vampire Lestat who made him what he is.

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: As rioting and civil unrest rocks Detroit during the summer of 1967, several policemen begin interrogating guests at the Algiers Motel. By the end of the night, three unarmed men are gunned down while several others are brutally beaten.

programme.title: The Young Messiah
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Jesus starts to discover his miraculous powers while travelling with Mary and Joseph to Nazareth.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains -- just who is running the government?

programme.title: Save The Cinema
programme.desc: Sky Original film following Welsh hairdresser Liz Evans fight to save her small towns theatre. Poignant British drama based on a true story starring Samantha Morton.

programme.title: The United States vs. Billie Holiday
programme.desc: The Federal Bureau of Narcotics launches an undercover sting operation against jazz singer Billie Holiday.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Lee
programme.desc: The story of photographer Elizabeth `Lee Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

programme.title: The Big Heat

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kembles wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Companion

programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. programme.title: Full Metal Jacket

programme.desc: Seafaring drama based on the true story of a commercial fishing boat crew who become caught in a terrifying storm off the coast of Massachusetts. In the autumn of 1991, a fishing boat captain is determined to set sail despite the adverse weather conditions, but when the ice machine breaks down his decision to brave the storm rather than lose his catch results in a battle against 100ft waves.

programme.title: Oceans Twelve
programme.desc: Casino mobster Benedict knows who stole his money and he wants it back. Danny and his crew of thieves have just two weeks to steal $190m, or their lives will be forfeit, but who is the mystery thief competing for the loot? This time Benedicts ex-girlfriend is on their side, even an integral part of the plan.

programme.title: Oceans Thirteen
programme.desc: The remaining members of Danny Oceans gang regroup to jeopardise the nefarious plans of a businessman who double-crossed one of Dannys old friends. The team plan to ruin the opening of his glitzy Las Vegas casino and hotel by rigging the games and ensuring that every punter goes home with a jackpot.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. Although completely without identity or background, he possesses an array of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistics and self-defence that speak of a dangerous past.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Life never becomes easy for ex-CIA agent Jason Bourne, who is forced out of hiding, and must return to Europe to find out exactly what happened in his past. Its not easy, as hes being framed for murder and his old employers are leading the manhunt.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Harlem drug dealer Frank Lucas rises to power in corrupt 1970s New York, equalling and surpassing the notorious Mafia families with the reach of his empire. On the other side of the law, honest cop Richie Roberts dedicates himself to taking down `the most dangerous man walking the streets. Lucas acts with impunity, smuggling heroin into the US in the coffins of American soldiers killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, Hitler invaded the Soviet Union. His aim was to weaken Britain in Europe and gain "lebensraum", or living space, in the East.

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people in a few months between 1942 and 1943.

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: The team are on the hunt for archaeology from the more recent past as they follow the search for artefacts from World War II. They join marine archaeologists in the Solent as they raise the once-in-a-lifetime find of a Fairey Barracuda divebomber. More than 2,500 Barracudas were in service during the war but not a single complete plane survives today. Naoíse Mac Sweeney joins the post excavation to reveal how the find could help bring this rare aircraft back to life.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Reveal the truth behind ancient legends. Tour an island covered in polar bears, see bizarre twin craters and examine an ocean formation similar to Atlantis.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the worlds top ten mysterious islands, including sites said to be home to giants, remote landmasses that are home to massive megalithic structures, and even islands that disappear into thin air.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Around the world and throughout history, people have reported seeing very similar types of unidentified objects in the sky. Now, Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten alien craft, from V-shaped objects to orbs of light to flying saucers.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-1 was a Soviet fighter aircraft of World War II. It was a single-seat monoplane with a composite structure and wooden wings and was a fast and competitive fighter aircraft.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The F-4 Phantom II is an American tandem two-seat, twin-engine, long-range supersonic jet interceptor and fighter-bomber originally developed by McDonnell Aircraft for the United States Navy.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Find out how a lobster led archaeologists to the discovery of an 8,000-year-old Neolithic underwater settlement. Join a team at a secret location in Dorset as they excavate an Iron Age crouched burial and in Londons East End,location reporter Naoise Mac Sweeney visits a modern construction site as it gives up the secrets of an Elizabethan playhouse.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts follows the excavation of Iron Age Britains most spectacular grave. A team of archaeologists in East Yorkshire have uncovered the remains of only the third upright chariot burial ever found in Britain, and the only chariot burial ever found in this country with the chariot harnessed to two standing ponies. This sensational find is the lead dig for the Digging for Britain Iron Age special.

Its reef, one the largest living structures on the planet, is home to more than 1,500 species of fish.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Return to South Luangwa to see the new pups born to the mighty Manzi and the tiny-but-fearless Kakumbi packs. See yearling Snowy face a hungry hyena before a lion pride scatters Manzi mum Wekas pups and leaves her frantically searching for them.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Run into a lion-hyena showdown with Julz as he hunts for the elusive Manzi pack, who are missing four of their precious pups. Then join Henry from the Zambian Carnivore Programme on a house call to the Kakumbi den, where another pup has gone AWOL.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Iceland is the worlds largest volcanic island. Its 30 active volcanoes generate one third of the worlds land-based lava. It is an island on fire. But while Iceland was built by volcanoes, it was sculpted by ice.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy travel to Argentina to meet two chimps as they prepare to bring them back to Dorset. The team attempt to sort out the macaques hierarchy problems.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy prepare to fly Sasha and Kangoo from Argentina to Dorset, which means crating and loading them in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.sub-title: Indonesia: The Secret Life of Manta Rays
programme.desc: The remote islands of Raja Ampat in the Indonesian archipelago are home to a diversity of marine life, including the secretive giants of the ocean, manta rays. A team of researchers from Conservation International heads out on an expedition to learn more about the biology, population size and migration patterns of these astonishing animals to protect them from overfishing outside of marine-protected areas.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Julz and park scout Simon track the Kakuli pack who they filmed previously, and a Manzi faction whove ditched a tracking collar and broken away from the group. The Kakumbi making a kill before a happy Manzi reunion.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Encountering an elephant as Julz and Henry track the Kakumbi pups who face off with a stubborn, razor-tusked warthog. ZCPs lion specialist Thandie Mweetwa counts the prides that are pushing the Manzi out of their territory.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces, the Great Dividing Range separates a thin ribbon of green from the continents arid heart.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Life isnt easy for Africas big five megafauna. Lions, leopards, buffalo, rhinos and elephants face many threats, from competing for food in a limited landscape to avoiding hunters and poachers. Explore the incredible adaptations of each species.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Mekong
programme.desc: The Mekong basin is one of the richest areas of biodiversity in the world, yet one of the most undiscovered. 20,000 plant species, 430 mammals, 1,200 birds, 800 reptiles and amphibians, and an estimated 850 fresh water fish species, are found in this very remote Asian region. Mysteries of the Mekong is a not-to-be-missed wildlife series that will truly be a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Follows a range of dedicated professionals and volunteers as they look after unwell animals and carefully nurse them back to health at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital in Brisbane, Australia.

programme.title: Gangs Of Baboon Falls
programme.desc: Look back at how the gangs have fared throughout a bizarre year of lockdown and return to normal.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Learn to swim with Ozzy the otter and his coach, Leslie, then see how Petronel has earned the trust of Riri the rhino orphan, who was traumatised by poachers.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Investigate the art of nest making with the jungles master builder: the orangutan. Shadow Max as he tries to escape the insect-filled floor of the Borneo rainforest and takes inspiration from this solitary primates natural engineering prowess.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that hes a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socialising.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: In the jungles of Thailand, clouded leopard cubs are chasing, climbing, jumping on each other and play fighting. they play these same games over and over again. The more they play, the more they hone their skills and eventually these cubs will become formidable tree-based hunters.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Animal experts take a look at how different kinds of animals play in the wild, each with their own set of rules.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenboroughs journey continues in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a birds-eye view in this spectacular documentary, charting the king penguins attempts to survive, find love and raise a family in the unforgiving Antarctic.

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Two Mothers, Nine Cubs: Chilli and her five cubs encounter young mother Inara and her four. See what happens when their standoff resolves into an unusual blended family.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: With their leader badly wounded, the Hollywood lionesses retreat and regroup. Meanwhile, the MK females use their feminine wiles to distract the nomadic band of bachelors.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of big cats, shining a light on the worlds of leopards, lions, and cheetahs.

programme.title: Africas Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: This series details the treasures in the vital ecosystems of the underwater world. Here the dune kingdoms of the Aliwal Shoal and Sodwana Bay are explored.

programme.title: Africas Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: On South Africas west coast, cape fur seals form huge breeding colonies and reproduce. For pups that cant swim, it is challenging start to life as they battle heat, hunger, congestion and ocean storms. Those that survive will take to the water and join the multitude of creatures that surround them.

programme.title: The Living Beach
programme.desc: Florida is famous for its sandy shores-and theres plenty to go around. Florida has the most tidal shoreline of any state in the continental USA.

programme.title: Souten: The Other Woman
programme.desc: After the accidental death of her lover, Mitali gets married to wealthy widower Ranbeer Singh who lives in a palace in Rajasthan, India, along with his daughter, Sapna.

programme.title: Ahankaar
programme.desc: Prabhat lost his voice saving his stepmother from a truck accident. Not long after, his father is sent to jail for taking bribes. Prabhat gets a job in a chemical factory to support the family. One day he catches the manager stealing chemicals, and he is sent to jail. The owner of the factory wants to make Prabhat the manager, but Prabhat suggests his stepbrother instead. Prem takes revenge on his family through his daughter.

programme.title: Dard
programme.desc: A man takes the blame for a crime he didnt commit to ensure his sisters happiness and safety. When he is released from jail, he learns that the woman he loved is no more.

programme.title: Junoon
programme.desc: A woman looks for a way to end a curse which turns her new husband into a deadly tiger during each full moon.

programme.title: Amar Prem
programme.desc: Nandu returns to the village where he grew up, looking for his childhood love Pushpa. However, Pushpas reputation has been forever tarnished.

programme.title: Izzat
programme.desc: When Adivashi returns home after completing his college, he learns that his mother has passed away and that she had been having an affair.

programme.title: Paap Ki Duniya
programme.desc: When a jailer hears that his sister is in love with a man, he is quite delighted to meet him only to find out that he is none other than a criminal called Pasha. What will the future hold for them?

programme.title: Pyaar Diwana Hota Hai
programme.desc: Illiterate Sunder moves from his small village to the city where he finds himself mocked by the girls he approaches because of his naïvety. Payal, however, takes pity on the young man, believing him to be dumb and mentally disabled. Enjoying the attention and knowing she will travel overseas, Sunder plays up to Payals first impressions only for her to fall in love with him.

programme.desc: The series about the Battle of Britain concludes with an assessment of the aftermath. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, Woolowitz is jealous when Bernadette asks Leonard about his work. Sensing his jealous streak, Bernadette threatens to break up with him.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is horrified when his mother Beverly turns up unannounced. His horror turns to anger when he learns that Sheldon knew about the visit and had found out about his parents divorce before him. Later, Penny and Beverly go out drinking together and Beverly and Sheldon kiss.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon has `theorist block and is finding it difficult to muddle through a formula hes been working on. Taking inspiration from Albert Einstein, he takes a job at the Cheesecake Factory to try to kick start his creativity.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to Switzerland on Valentines Day to see the worlds largest particle accelerator. Sheldon is gutted when Leonard asks Penny to go with him, as a Valentines Day treat, instead of him. Sheldon tries to coerce the couple into letting him take Pennys place, will they relent?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is summoned to court for driving through a red light while taking Penny to hospital in an earlier episode. He misses meeting Stan Lee, creator of `Spiderman, at the comic book store and riles the judge so much that he ends up in prison. Penny feels so guilty that Sheldon has missed out on the opportunity to meet Stan Lee that she finds out his home address and takes Sheldon there.

Can Charlie and Lee come up with a design that ticks all the boxes for £2,500?

programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh presents the garden makeover show, transforming neglected spaces for some very special people. Alan and the team are in Dorset creating a garden for a young family coping with terminal illness. The couple were planning their future when Andrew was diagnosed with bowel cancer.

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories

programme.title: The Wild Gardener

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh presents the garden makeover show, transforming neglected spaces for some very special people. Alan and the team are in Dorset creating a garden for a young family coping with terminal illness. Student Rachel is 27 and met 29-year-old Dorset farm worker Andrew while out clubbing six years ago, and they became an item instantly. The couple were planning their future when Andrew was diagnosed with bowel cancer.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Ben and Ruth need the help of the Garden Rescue team to transform their dated garden into something more chic. Theres currently too much concrete and too many level changes for it to be safe for baby Eve. The couple are imagining a wild, natural garden with prairie-style planting and some opportunities for growing their own vegetables, and they also want to adopt some chickens from a rescue centre. Can Charlie and Lee come up with a design that ticks all the boxes for £2,500?

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick Stein travels to St Ives to meet one of Britains little-known artists, Alfred Wallis. In the shadow of Bodmin Moor Rick visits a very rare collection of medieval stained-glass windows in the church of St Neot. programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick Stein travels to St Ives to meet one of Britains little-known artists, Alfred Wallis. In the shadow of Bodmin Moor Rick visits a very rare collection of medieval stained-glass windows in the church of St Neot. It is here he ticks off an item on his bucket list by taking part in a rather unusual celebration called Oak Apple Day, marking the occasion when Charles II became king.

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick meets `Springwatch presenter and biologist Gillian Burke, who takes Rick on a walk through a rare habitat called an Atlantic temperate rainforest on the banks of the Helford River. Rick also follows his passion for cured meats when he discovers a husband-and-wife team making premium Cornish salami.

programme.title: Kingdom

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon travels from Chiles Atacama Desert right down to Tierra Del Fuego, the most southerly inhabited place on Earth. The Atacama, one of the driest places on the planet, has as little as 1mm of rain per year.

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon meets some of the Cumbrian characters with different visions for the future of Englands biggest National Park, including a campaign group trying to protect the remaining red squirrel populations.

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon looks at the impact of humans on Englands biggest and most popular national park. He goes wild swimming in the crystal-clear lake of Buttermere, before taking a look at the less-fortunate Derwent Water.

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon explores the wild and rugged coast of Cumbria and learns how central the county is to many of the challenges facing Britain. The Lake District National Park includes a beautiful stretch of Cumbrias coast, where rare Natterjack Toads inhabit a spectacular sand dune landscape.

programme.desc: Patricks cherry tree launches an attack on Victors junipers, which prompts Victor to make a big mistake. Meanwhile, Victors interest in tropical fish arouses the interest of the local Greenpeace branch.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Roger, Victors cousin, accidentally invites the couple to his 60th birthday. Margaret collapses with exhaustion and Victors attempts at nursing her back to health only make things worse. However, Margarets spirits pick up when Andrea Temple, the little girl who used to live next door, comes back to visit her old neighbours with her new baby. Victor is less enthusiastic.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A day out on the river leads to epic complications for the Meldrews, Mrs Warboys, and Nick Swainey when they find themselves marooned in the middle of Norfolks answer to the Sargasso Sea.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrews are back from holiday and find that Patrick and Pippa are trying to sell up to a man whos very interested in diving goggles. programme.desc: While on call for jury service, Victor spends a whole day at home alone, but somehow ends up being the one on trial.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how the trial of one `witch sparked Britains witch-hunt craze. The story goes that in 1590, a coven of witches gathered here to cast a spell to try to kill the King of Scotland, James VI.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Roger, Victors cousin, accidentally invites the couple to his 60th birthday. Margaret collapses with exhaustion and Victors attempts at nursing her back to health only make things worse. However, Margarets spirits pick up when Andrea Temple, the little girl who used to live next door, comes back to visit her old neighbours with her new baby. Victor is less enthusiastic.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A day out on the river leads to epic complications for the Meldrews, Mrs Warboys, and Nick Swainey when they find themselves marooned in the middle of Norfolks answer to the Sargasso Sea.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrews are back from holiday and find that Patrick and Pippa are trying to sell up to a man whos very interested in diving goggles. programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: When the Trotters go shopping, they have no idea whats in store. The hapless trio end up being accused of shoplifting when they lose their receipts. In the managers office, things go from bad to worse as they become involved in an armed robbery. The perpetrator turns out to be someone Del sold a dodgy watch to as the Trotters spend a long night with the gunman.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Problems arise for the Trotters when Del and Rodders both fall for the same girl, Triggers niece. programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terrys boss is not amused when the plans for a new talking fire extinguisher go missing, and to add to Terrys problems, his nephew Andrew is being hounded by bailiffs.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: June and Beattie team up as caterers, but when Malcolm insists his wife backs out of the venture, June is left to cope single-handedly with an important dinner given by Sir Dennis. Enter Terry the butler.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry joins the local neighbourhood watch scheme, but everything doesnt quite go to plan.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Junes fairy-tale dream of princesses, knights and dragons, recounted over breakfast one morning, comes true - but with a different slant.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June find themselves the centre of attention after receiving a windfall.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Junes wish for a cleaning lady, Terrys new pet, and a couple of unexpected arrivals add up to a typically complicated situation for the Medfords.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the landlord of the local pub is advised to take a rest by his doctor, Terry and June offer to run the place in his absence. However, their good deed looks set to backfire when Sir Dennis threatens to sack anyone found guilty of moonlighting.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry loves to be the centre of attention, but when he discovers he bears an uncanny resemblance to a criminal, he wishes the spotlight would focus on someone else.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry experiences pangs of jealousy when June arranges to meet a childhood sweetheart. Misunderstandings and advice from Sir Dennis compound the situation.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In this 100th episode, the crews go cross country after a teenagers bike crash, attend a man whos had a nasty fall and help a woman with end-stage cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: South Central paramedics race to a newborn baby with a low temperature, while crews in Oxford and Portsmouth deal with a man vomiting blood and a patients mysterious hip pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics are sent to help a 49-year-old who has fallen in the street after a night out in Stoke, while in Dudley, paramedics visit a 5-month-old who has a temperature and isnt drinking.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with severe allergies some medication.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: What is left behind when urban areas are abandoned? Hear about some extraordinary ghost towns, including Pripyat - frozen in time after Chernobyl - and Hashima Island.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The eerie world of abandoned space age projects, including the HARP gun in Barbados and the mountainside Barcroft Observatory in California.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Magnificent bridges that time forgot: Goat Canyon Trestle in California was destroyed by a hurricane, while Kinzua Viaduct was destroyed by a tornado.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Once-great triumphs of marine engineering now left to rust include a ship graveyard in Maryland colonised by wildlife, and a Cold War sub.

programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.sub-title: Million Pound Build for Children in Need
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Building an extension to meet the needs of their growing family seemed a straightforward proposition for Neil and Rebecca Smith, but then Neil was made redundant and the couples youngest child began to display signs of autism. Nick Knowles and the team enlist the aid of the local community to rescue this family. They have just 10 days to complete the build.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team enlist the help of the local community in Aberystwyth to renovate a home for a builder with a brain tumour. Michael Saunders built an extension onto his house when his son- in-laws MS meant he had to start using a wheelchair. When Michael discovered he had cancer, he was unable to finish his own home and he and his partner were left living in a cold and draughty shell of a house.

programme.title: The Bill

programme.title: The Bill

programme.desc: Elaine seeks love online and meets a promising man from Egypt, to whom she sends money, We meet Sams parents, and Nan goes to a funeral.

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Lauren asks her teacher if hes gay, Nan and an old friend render `Bridge Over Troubled Water, and Kate asks Ellen to guess which is the worst swearword used in the office.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: The Fall family, mum Julia, dad Dan and their two children, Noah and Rachel, moved into their current home four years ago, and their clutter has been spiraling out of control ever since, with Dans many unfinished DIY projects contributing to the overall chaos. Stacey Solomon helps them sort through all their stuff and relinquish the things they no longer need. With Staceys help, the family pack all their possessions into boxes.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life, from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, as well as the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his 1913 railway guide, Michael Portillo returns to his native Spain and travels from Madrid, through Cordoba and onto the Rock of Gibraltar.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo takes the train from the former political capital of Italy, Turin, to Casanovas capital of romance, Venice. Along the way, he recreates the famous `Italian Job on a historic Fiat test track and follows fashion in Milan before investigating the early 20th century British love affair with Lake Como in a seaplane. In Verona, Michael discovers the `House of the Capulets, bought to attract Edwardian tourists to the scene of Shakespeares `Romeo and Juliet.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault Clio Williams 2 in F1 blue with contrasting gold alloys has turned Dave Mathewson an interesting shade of green.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96, but despite a stunning restoration, could it result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction?

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: This unique documentary series covers an almost forgotten chapter of WWII: Hollands involvement. Occupation in 1940; repression; liberation in 1944.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: `The Nazi who said sorry, German architect Albert Speer was one of the only war criminals to accept his guilt at the Nuremberg trials, but was his remorse a ruse?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow come from the largest green space in Glasgow, Pollok Country Park, where finds include clothes by fashion designer Alexander McQueen, a historic telescope and silver treasures used in an ancient royal ritual. Ronnie Archer Morgan finds a small but impactful piece of sculpture, while Marc Allum looks to the skies for a valuation of an important telescope linked to early astronomical exploration.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from Alexandra Gardens in the heart of Cardiff, where treasures include a pipe by a renowned Maori craftsman, a book listing wartime spies and a rare SAS medal collection.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and collection of tractors, but extracting them from a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Mosckovitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics.

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: `The Nazi who said sorry, German architect Albert Speer was one of the only war criminals to accept his guilt at the Nuremberg trials, but was his remorse a ruse?

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: The great mountain ranges are some of the planets most spectacular landscapes, but they are unforgiving places to live in. Only few pioneering animals have what it takes to endure at extreme altitude. Mountain animals are also amongst the most elusive in the world, yet this film provides unique and intimate glimpses into their secretive lives. Witness the moment four snow leopards come together when a mother and cub become trapped between two rival males.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Jungles are mysterious worlds of high drama where extraordinary animal characters struggle to survive in the most competitive place on earth. Flooded forests are home to caiman-hunting Jaguars, and strange dolphins that swim amongst the tree tops, whilst in the dense underworld, ninja frogs fight off wasps and flying dragons soar between trees.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: With Mackay away, the Slade Prison inmates anticipate a period of rest and good times for all, but that is until his replacement arrives and suddenly Mackay doesnt seem so bad.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: For some reason, the powers that be have given the inmates of Slade prison a weekend break to pursue their hobbies. Is this wise? Fletcher just wants to put his feet up in his cell with a good book, but others have different ideas as to how he should spend his time.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: A broken ankle provides Fletcher with a pleasant spell in the prison hospital. Fellow patient Blanco is convinced he is going to die, so he gives Fletcher a map showing where he buried an ill-gotten £8,000.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and collection of tractors, but extracting them from a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Experts Henry Cole and Simon OBrien celebrate Henrys birthday with some serious finds in Wensleydale, Yorkshire.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Ocean Venture has headed north and is fishing at `The Edge, only 150 miles south of the Arctic Circle. Having failed to catch enough fish, skipper John Buchan is taking a huge risk in the deep and treacherous waters of the North Atlantic in a bid to find the perfect catch. With the previous nights storm over, Amity gets back to the business of trying to catch prawns.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Offshore fishing, the most dangerous job in Britain, has a problem when it comes to getting new recruits, but 17-year-old Ryan wants to take up the challenge. He sets out on his first trip on one of the most successful pair of trawlers in Britain as they head into the rough Norwegian waters looking for cod and haddock. If he doesnt impress skipper Kevin West, hell be looking for a new job when they come back.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: On the last leg of his 300-mile journey across the north and the Midlands, Robbie Cumming faces issues with ice on the Grand Union Canal, he takes on Foxtons famous lock flight in Leicestershire and completes his journey in the picturesque village Braunston, Northamptonshire, regarded as the spiritual home for narrowboaters.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: A low canal tunnel in Staffordshire proves a problem and Robbie helps out a stranded boater.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming journeys through Royal Leamington Spa and the historic town of Warwick with its medieval castle.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn
programme.desc: This leg of the journey crosses South Africa, Mozambique and the beautiful Island of Madagascar. Simon comes face to face with the dramatic Zimbabwean refugee crisis, meets giant rats helping to clear land mines in Mozambique, eats soup made from the penis of the zebu (a type of ox), and visits a wild town where thousands of poor Madagascans are digging for sapphires.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon is in the United States travelling down the Rocky Mountains from Montana to Colorado. In wide open prairies of Montana, the cowboy way of life is under threat from a long term decline in the rural economy but Simon meets a former Silicon Valley executive who has envisaged a new future for the land.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a look at deserts, which cover a third of the Earths land surface. From space they appear lifeless but a closer look reveals a different picture.Deserts, in fact, are surprisingly varied; from Mongolias Gobi desert where wild Bactrian camels have to eat snow in lieu of water, to the Atacama in Chile where guanacos survive by licking the dew off cactus spines.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the vast gatherings of wildlife, but to survive here animals must endure the most hostile seasonal changes on the planet. From Asias bizarre looking Saiga antelope, to the giant anteaters of Brazil, grassland animals have adapted in extraordinary ways to cope with these extremes.
